messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Say hello world in a Node app with a single endpoint
Clarifications:
None
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Say hello world in a Node app with a single endpoint",
  "decompositionStrategy": "Top-down incremental: initialize project, add dependencies, create server file, implement endpoint, add run script, then run and verify. Each step is testable before moving to the next.",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "init-node-project",
      "title": "Initialize Node project",
      "description": "Create a new project directory and initialize with npm to produce a package.json (npm init -y or equivalent).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "A package.json file exists in the project root and npm init completed without errors."
    },
    {
      "id": "install-express-dependency",
      "title": "Install Express dependency",
      "description": "Install Express (or an alternative HTTP library) as a dependency so the app can create HTTP endpoints (e.g., npm install express).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "init-node-project"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Express is listed in package.json dependencies and node_modules contains express."
    },
    {
      "id": "create-server-file",
      "title": "Create server file",
      "description": "Add a server entry file (e.g., index.js or app.js) that will hold the HTTP server code and module imports.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "init-node-project"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "A server file exists at the project root (index.js or app.js) and is readable."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-hello-endpoint",
      "title": "Implement Hello World endpoint",
      "description": "Write code in the server file to define a single GET endpoint (e.g., GET /) that responds with the text 'Hello World' and appropriate 200 status.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "create-server-file",
        "install-express-dependency"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "A GET request to the root path (/) returns HTTP 200 and the response body contains exactly 'Hello World'."
    },
    {
      "id": "add-start-script",
      "title": "Add start script to package.json",
      "description": "Update package.json to include a scripts.start entry that runs the server file (e.g., node index.js) for convenient startup.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "init-node-project",
        "create-server-file"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "package.json contains a scripts.start field and npm start launches the server without immediate errors."
    },
    {
      "id": "run-and-smoke-test",
      "title": "Run server and perform smoke test",
      "description": "Start the app (npm start) and perform a smoke test by sending an HTTP GET to the endpoint and verifying the response and status code.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "implement-hello-endpoint",
        "add-start-script"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Server process starts, responds to GET / with HTTP 200 and body 'Hello World', and no uncaught exceptions are logged."
    },
    {
      "id": "write-readme",
      "title": "Document usage in README",
      "description": "Add a brief README describing how to start the server and how to call the endpoint, including example curl or HTTP request.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "implement-hello-endpoint"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "README.md exists with start instructions and at least one example request showing GET / returns 'Hello World'."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 7
}
